message:
✨ Add CardControls with sort direction and drill-down enhancements (#43)

* ✨ Add CardControls with sort direction and drill-down enhancements

- Add CardControls component with limit dropdown and sort options
- Add SortDirection type (asc/desc) to all cards
- Support ascending/descending toggle button in card headers
- Add ResourcesDrillDown view for cluster resources
- Fix Login page auth validation timing
- Enrich cluster data with health info from agent
- Update card components: PodIssues, DeploymentIssues, ClusterHealth,
  AppStatus, DeploymentStatus, EventStream, SecurityIssues, TopPods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* 🐛 fix: Remove unused RefreshCw import from AppStatus

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

---------

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
